analysis_boundary: The five conditions, identical freshness fields in both compact tracks, pure verifier-session transition, cycle-80 intervention, 320-cycle horizon, eight separate gates, training seeds 9201-9208, validation seeds 9217-9224, and 80 held-out seeds 9225-9304 were frozen after v0.9.0 adversarial review and before v0.9.1 held-out execution.
claim_boundary: In this controlled experiment, a compact verified handoff preserved specified state and changed post-intervention performance by the measured amount. Stateful signed binding rejected replay and cross-run copy; checksum-only binding with identical fields did not prevent attacker rebinding.

post_open_execution_amendment.effect_on_results: None. The mechanism, seeds, thresholds, attacks, outcomes, and pass/fail values are unchanged.
post_open_execution_amendment.reason: After opening held-out output, corrected one descriptive gate field from the inherited 'without_run_binding' label to the implemented 'with_rewritable_run_parent_generation_fields' label.
